headline: Jefferies Remains a Buy on Eli Lilly and Company (LLY)
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) is one of the Good Stocks to Buy Now. On March 20, Jefferies reiterated a Buy rating on Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) with a price target of $1,300. ​The rating is based on the company’s prescription data for GLP-1 medications. Oral Wegovy had roughly 89,300 IMS prescriptions and 76,800 […]

headline: Eli Lilly Secures $2.75 Billion Deal With Insilico Medicine To Bring AI-Developed Drugs To Global Market: Report
summary: Eli Lilly's deal involves an upfront payment of $115 million to Insilico, with additional payments tied to milestones.

headline: Eli Lilly reaches $2.75 billion deal with Insilico to bring AI-developed drugs to the global market
summary: U.S. pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly will give Hong Kong-listed Insilico $115 million upfront to bring some of its AI-discovered drugs to the global market.

raw.headline: Eli Lilly reaches $2.75 billion deal with Insilico to bring AI-developed drugs to the global market
raw.summary: U.S. pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly will give Hong Kong-listed Insilico $115 million upfront to bring some of its AI-discovered drugs to the global market.
